message.content:

1. src/redux/ducks/additionalCard.ts - Remove all unused items on lines 20, 23-31, 143-150

2. src/redux/ducks/addressCard.ts - Remove all unused items on lines 5-9, 24, 43, 98-99, 102, 117

3. src/redux/ducks/blockCard.ts - Remove all unused items on lines 5-8, 33, 89-95

4. src/redux/ducks/cardTracking.ts - Remove unused TimelineType on line 40 and data on line 78

5. src/redux/ducks/cashback.ts - Remove unused data on line 33 and Transactions on line 45

6. src/redux/ducks/contents.ts - Remove unused items on lines 6, 14-17, 51

7. src/redux/ducks/createPassword.ts - Remove unused items on lines 5-8, 11, 57, 61

8. src/redux/ducks/credencial.ts - Remove unused items on lines 5-8, 62-63

Read each file, make the necessary deletions, keep files well formatted.
